books.title: Crime and Punishment
books.author: Fyodor Dostoevsky
books.summary: A psychological thriller that follows Raskolnikov, a poor student who murders a pawnbroker, exploring themes of morality and redemption in 19th century Russia.
books.historical_context: Written during a time of great social and political upheaval in Russia, reflecting the period's philosophical debates about morality and individual will.

books.title: Pride and Prejudice
books.author: Jane Austen
books.summary: A witty examination of the manners, marriage, and social class in Georgian England through the story of Elizabeth Bennet and Mr. Darcy.
books.historical_context: Set during the Regency era in England, depicting the social conventions and expectations of the landed gentry.
